sentences.target: Ich muss morgen meine Uniform waschen.

translations.de: Ich muss morgen meine Uniform waschen.
translations.en: I have to wash my uniform tomorrow.
translations.es: Tengo que lavar mi uniforme mañana.
translations.fr: Je dois laver mon uniforme demain.
translations.it: Devo lavare la mia divisa domani.
translations.he: אני צריך לכבס את המדים שלי מחר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi phải giặt đồng phục.
translations.nl: Ik moet morgen mijn uniform wassen.
translations.hu: Holnap ki kell mosnom az egyenruhám.
translations.hi: मुझे कल अपनी वर्दी धोनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να πλύνω τη στολή μου αύριο.
translations.nb: Jeg må vaske uniformen min i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag måste tvätta min uniform i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg skal vaske min uniform i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日制服を洗わなきゃ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'waschen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies 'Uniform'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object in accusative.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive governed by the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Deine Uniform sieht heute echt sauber aus.
sentences.reading: /ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈunifɔʁm ziːt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɛçt ˈzaʊ̯bɐ aʊ̯s/

translations.de: Deine Uniform sieht heute echt sauber aus.
translations.ipa: /ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈunifɔʁm ziːt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɛçt ˈzaʊ̯bɐ aʊ̯s/
translations.en: Your uniform looks really clean today.
translations.es: Tu uniforme se ve muy limpio hoy.
translations.fr: Ton uniforme est vraiment propre aujourd’hui.
translations.it: La tua divisa è davvero pulita oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 네 교복 정말 깨끗해 보여.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天的制服看起来很干净。
translations.yue: 你件校服今日真係好乾淨。
translations.ru: Сегодня твоя форма выглядит очень чисто.
translations.pt: Seu uniforme está bem limpo hoje.
translations.he: המדים שלך נראים ממש נקיים היום.
translations.vi: Đồng phục của bạn hôm nay trông rất sạch.
translations.nl: Je uniform ziet er vandaag echt schoon uit.
translations.uk: Сьогодні твоя форма виглядає дуже чисто.
translations.hu: Az egyenruhád ma tényleg nagyon tiszta.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हारी वर्दी वाकई बहुत साफ लग रही है।
translations.pl: Twój mundur jest dziś naprawdę czysty.
translations.el: Η στολή σου σήμερα φαίνεται πολύ καθαρή.
translations.nb: Uniformen din ser skikkelig ren ut i dag.
translations.id: Seragammu kelihatan sangat bersih hari ini.
translations.sv: Din uniform ser verkligen ren ut i dag.
translations.ro: Uniforma ta arată foarte curată azi.
translations.cs: Tvoje uniforma dnes vypadá opravdu čistě.
translations.da: Din uniform ser virkelig ren ud i dag.
translations.ja: 今日、君の制服すごくきれいだね。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular noun in nominative; modifies 'Uniform'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject in nominative.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present, part of the separable verb 'aussehen' ('sieht ... aus').
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'sauber'.
Predicative adjective complement with 'aussehen'.
Separable verbal particle forming 'aussehen' with 'sieht'.

sentences.target: Er hat die Uniform im Spind vergessen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ hat diː ˈunifɔʁm ɪm ʃpɪnt fɛʁˈɡɛsən/

translations.de: Er hat die Uniform im Spind vergessen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ hat diː ˈunifɔʁm ɪm ʃpɪnt fɛʁˈɡɛsən/
translations.en: He forgot the uniform in the locker.
translations.es: Se le olvidó el uniforme en el casillero.
translations.fr: Il a oublié l'uniforme dans le casier.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把制服忘在了储物柜里。
translations.yue: 佢唔記得咗件校服留咗喺儲物櫃入面。
translations.pt: Ele esqueceu o uniforme no armário.
translations.he: הוא שכח את המדים בתוך הלוקר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy quên đồng phục trong tủ đồ.
translations.nl: Hij is zijn uniform in het kluisje vergeten.
translations.hi: वह अपनी वर्दी लॉकर में भूल गया।
translations.ja: 彼はロッカーに制服を忘れた。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Auxiliary verb, present 3rd singular; forms present perfect with 'vergessen'.
Definite article for feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies 'Uniform'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object in accusative.
Contracted preposition + definite article ('in dem'); introduces a dative locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'im' in dative (location).
Past participle of the main verb; complements 'hat' to form the present perfect.

sentences.target: Die Uniform passt mir leider nicht.

translations.de: Die Uniform passt mir leider nicht.
translations.en: The uniform unfortunately doesn't fit me.
translations.es: Lamentablemente, el uniforme no me queda.
translations.fr: L'uniforme ne me va malheureusement pas.
translations.it: Purtroppo la divisa non mi sta.
translations.ru: К сожалению, форма мне не подходит.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, o uniforme não me serve.
translations.vi: Tiếc là bộ đồng phục không vừa với tôi.
translations.nl: Het uniform past me helaas niet.
translations.uk: На жаль, форма мені не підходить.
translations.hu: Sajnos nem jó rám az egyenruha.
translations.hi: अफ़सोस, वर्दी मुझ पर ठीक से नहीं बैठती।
translations.pl: Niestety mundur nie pasuje na mnie.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, η στολή δεν μου κάνει.
translations.id: Sayangnya, seragam itu tidak muat untukku.
translations.ro: Din păcate, uniforma nu îmi vine.
translations.ja: 残念だけど、その制服は私に合わない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article for feminine singular noun in nominative; modifies the subject.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject in nominative.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a dative experiencer.
1st person singular personal pronoun in dative; experiencer/indirect object of 'passt'.
Sentence adverb expressing speaker attitude.
Negation particle negating the clause.

Er hat die Uniform im Spind vergessen.
Die Uniform passt mir leider nicht.
